request: Rank the 4 best Toyota Supra generations overall across the full production run. Use 4 different generations when available, with one representative version from each generation. If the model has fewer than 4 true generations, use the most important era-defining versions across its history.
title: RANKING THE BEST TOYOTA SUPRA GENERATIONS
close_narration: Which Supra generation would you park in your garage?
order_rationale: Ordered from the earliest to the latest generation to showcase the evolution of the Supra.

entries.name: A40 Celica Supra
entries.label: THE ORIGIN
entries.one_line_fact: Debuting in 1979 at $10,998 with 110 horsepower, the A40 Celica Supra laid the foundation for Toyota's iconic sports car lineage. Today, clean examples trade around $7K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $7K.
entries.narration: Debuting in 1979 at $10,998 with 110 horsepower, the A40 Celica Supra laid the foundation for Toyota's iconic sports car lineage. Today, clean examples trade around $7K.

entries.name: A60 Celica Supra
entries.label: 80s ICON
entries.one_line_fact: In 1982, the A60 Celica Supra hit the scene at $13,698, boasting 145 horsepower and those unforgettable pop-up headlights. Today, clean examples trade around $9K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $9K.
entries.narration: In 1982, the A60 Celica Supra hit the scene at $13,698, boasting 145 horsepower and those unforgettable pop-up headlights. Today, clean examples trade around $9K.

entries.name: A70 Supra Turbo
entries.label: TURBOCHARGED BEAST
entries.one_line_fact: Then in 1987, the A70 Supra Turbo arrived at $18,980, delivering 230 horsepower and introducing turbocharged thrills to the lineup. Today, clean examples trade around $15K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $15K.
entries.narration: Then in 1987, the A70 Supra Turbo arrived at $18,980, delivering 230 horsepower and introducing turbocharged thrills to the lineup. Today, clean examples trade around $15K.

entries.name: A80 Supra Turbo
entries.label: LEGENDARY PERFORMANCE
entries.one_line_fact: At number one, the 1993 A80 Supra Turbo launched at $39,900, packing 320 horsepower and the legendary 2JZ engine that became a tuner favorite. Today, clean examples trade around $160K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $160K.
entries.narration: At number one, the 1993 A80 Supra Turbo launched at $39,900, packing 320 horsepower and the legendary 2JZ engine that became a tuner favorite. Today, clean examples trade around $160K.
